# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

imports:
- path: "${modules.common}"
- path: "${modules.gcp_resources}"
- path: "${modules.folder}"
- path: "${modules.iam_member}"

resources:
  - name: iam-policy-membership
    type: "compute_project_metadata"
    properties:
      project: '{{project}}'
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: 'enable-oslogin'
            value: 'TRUE'
  
  - name: ci-cd-service-account
    type: "gcp-types/iam-v1::projects.serviceAccounts"
    properties:
      projectId: '{{project}}'
      accountId: 'ci-cd-service-account'
      displayName: 'CI CD Service Account'
  
  - name: grant-owner-role
    type: "gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1::members"
    properties:
      resource: 'projects/{{project}}'
      member: 'serviceAccount:ci-cd-service-account@{{project}}.iam.gserviceaccount.com'
      role: 'roles/owner'
